title: Redesign homepage with dark purple theme, centered branding, and home icon nav bar

requirements.text: Create a new HomePage component styled after the reference screenshot: a full-screen dark purple gradient background (deep near-black purple at edges, slightly lighter/glowing purple in the center), with a live clock and temperature-style widget centered at the top (reuse ClockWidget), a large centered brand title using a gradient text effect (fading from dark purple/dim to bright white, similar to the reference but using the app's own name — 'Cheetah' or 'CHEETAH PROXY' — instead of 'VAPOR v4'), a subtle tagline below the title in muted gray text, and a version/Discord-style info line at the bottom center.

quotes: make a home page look like this just don't say vapor v4

acceptanceCriteria: Page renders with a full-screen dark purple radial gradient background matching the reference screenshot aesthetic
No text says 'VAPOR' or 'v4' anywhere on the page
A large centered heading uses gradient text (dim purple to bright white left-to-right) displaying the app's own branding name
A muted gray subtitle/tagline is displayed below the main heading
ClockWidget (or equivalent) is displayed at the top center showing current time
A version/info line is displayed at the bottom center of the page

requirements.text: Add a home icon button fixed to the bottom-left corner of the screen (matching the reference screenshot's bottom-left home icon position). Clicking the home icon opens a navigation drawer or overlay panel that lists links to ALL pages/sections of the app: Home, Proxy/Browser, Games, Search, and any other existing pages. Clicking a nav link navigates to that page and closes the panel.

quotes: the home icon goes to the navigation bar that accesses ALL pages

acceptanceCriteria: A home icon button is fixed at the bottom-left corner of the viewport on all pages
Clicking the home icon opens a navigation panel or drawer
The navigation panel lists links to all available pages: Home, Browser/Proxy, Games, Search
Clicking any nav link navigates to the correct page and closes the nav panel
The home icon and nav panel are visible and accessible from every page in the app

requirements.text: Integrate the new HomePage as the default landing view inside BrowserLayout (or as a new top-level route). When a new tab is opened or the app first loads, show the HomePage instead of a blank/empty state. The existing proxy, search, and games views remain accessible via navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Opening the app or a new tab shows the HomePage by default
The HomePage is not shown when the user is actively viewing proxied content, search results, or the games page
Navigating via the home icon nav bar back to 'Home' returns to the HomePage

constraints: Do not use the text 'VAPOR' or 'v4' anywhere in the UI
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Keep all existing proxy, search, tab, and games functionality intact
nonGoals: Adding any network bypass, proxy circumvention, or school filter evasion features
Changing the overall Cheetah dark/orange theme tokens — the homepage uses a purple variant only for its own background
